name: spotify-daily-playlist-automation
description: Cloud cron automation that refreshes daily Spotify playlists with rule-based scoring.

scripts.check: node --check src/jobs/daily-generate.mjs && node --check src/lib/spotify.mjs && node --check src/lib/supabase.mjs && node --check src/lib/recommender.mjs && node --check src/scripts/auth-url.mjs && node --check src/scripts/oauth-local.mjs && node --check src/scripts/exchange-code.mjs
